# BP-155 negative variant: a renamed request body is bounded before decoding.
lang: go
file: BP-155-variant-safe.go
variant: bounded-renamed-request-body
---
package api

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

func create(w http.ResponseWriter, request *http.Request) {
	body := http.MaxBytesReader(w, request.Body, 1<<20)
	var payload map[string]string
	if err := json.NewDecoder(body).Decode(&payload); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "bad request", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusAccepted)
}
